title: Image 1 of Constitutional Whig (Richmond, Va.), October 22, 1830
description: f i Mm Hr PLEASANTS ABBOTT RICHMOND VIRGINIA FRIDAY MORNING OCTOBER 90 n Vol VIINo 77 jejgongtituHonal ggafrlg WEDNESDAY MOKN1NG OCT 30 1830 The foreign news by rhe Birmingham in our co lumns todaywill be found interesting The only part ofit which looks at all like war is that relating to Russia No apprehension however seems to exist that the measures taken by the Enipcrior of Russia are any thing more than precautionary upon the bsl news of the revolution in France all accounts justify the belief that Belgium will settle down into a calm state and France thus escape the chance of being forced into a war for its protection The election returns in New Jersey have yet been but partially received The Trenton State Gazette says as far as heard from the majoriry of the next Legislature is of the Jackson party We received no Philadelphia papers today and can therefore give no furl her authentic accounts of the elections in Pennsylvania We see that a correspondent of the N Y Courier if Enquirer admits that Col Watmough elected in the third Congressional District in Pennsylvania is opposed to the Administration It iB so rare that we meet
